info.description: Sub-pages under /experiences (Workshops, Retreats, Corporate Wellbeing, Speaking). PAGE LAYOUT, top to bottom: 1) Hero band — kicker + title + tagline on the LEFT, heroImage on the RIGHT. 2) Body band — intro paragraphs, full width. 3) Cards band — secondaryList becomes a grid of 4 cards. 4) Reviews. 5) Enquiry form. 6) FAQ. 7) Upsells. After editing, click 'View live page →' (green button, right sidebar) to see the result.

title.description: HERO TITLE — large heading on the LEFT side of the top hero band (e.g. 'Corporate Wellbeing.').

slug.description: URL slug. Must match the route exactly: 'workshops', 'retreats', 'corporate-wellbeing', 'speaking'.

kicker.description: Small uppercase label ABOVE the hero title. Default 'Experiences'.

kickerColour.description: Hex colour for the kicker. Default blue #7BAFDD.

eyebrow.description: Alternative kicker text — overrides 'kicker' when filled (e.g. 'Experiences · For teams'). Leave blank to use 'kicker' instead.

tagline.description: ITALIC TAGLINE — single line shown UNDER the hero title (e.g. 'Nervous system work that actually changes how people show up.'). Leave blank to skip.

heroImage.description: HERO IMAGE — large image on the RIGHT side of the top hero band, beside the title. Portrait orientation works best (4:5 ratio, ~800×1000px). If empty, a stock image is used so the page never looks broken.

intro.description: BODY PARAGRAPHS — appears in the white band below the hero. Separate paragraphs with a BLANK LINE between them. Each blank line creates a new paragraph.

ctaLabel.description: Optional button text (rarely visible on these pages).

secondaryList.description: CARDS GRID — becomes a 4-column grid of cards in the cream band below the body. Use for Corporate 'Formats', Speaking 'Talks' etc. ONE CARD PER LINE. Format: 'Title|Body description'. Example: '90-minute session|A single workshop. Online or in person.'. Leave blank to hide the entire cards band.

pricePence.description: Optional. Price in pence (e.g. 1500 = £15, 20000 = £200). Leave 0 for 'enquire for price' pages (Corporate Wellbeing, Speaking).

isRecurring.description: Always leave OFF for experience-page items — they are one-off purchases.

mailchimpTag.description: Mailchimp tag attached on successful payment. Example: 'Workshop Buyers'. Leave blank for non-purchasable pages.

seoTitle.description: LEAVE BLANK — the system auto-fills with a Google-search-style title on save. Only fill in if you want to override.

seoDescription.description: LEAVE BLANK — auto-fills on save in 'what someone would Google' style. Only fill in if you want to override.

upsells.description: BOTTOM 'WHERE NEXT' SECTION — up to 3 cards shown at the bottom suggesting next steps. e.g. Workshops shows Reset Room + The Reset; Corporate Workshops shows nothing (leave empty).
